title: Publish benchmarks
description: Nobody in the local semantic code search space has published indexing throughput or search latency p50/p99 on a standardized corpus. Differentiation opportunity. Protocol: Linux kernel at pinned commit (large) + omengrep src (small). Indexing: cold start, wall time, blocks/sec, files/sec. Search: 3 warmup + 10 timed runs, p50/p99. Publish raw data. See ai/research/benchmark-methodology.md.
